title: CycleLogV1
description: Cycle Association Log. Maps canonical object IDs to the cycle metadata of each execution in which they were observed.
$comment:
Governing contracts:
  ORCHESTRATOR-EXECUTION-CONTRACT.md Section IX (file named)
  PRESSURE-LIFECYCLE-CONTRACT.md: "Cycle Association Log: maps Canonical CPS ID
    to observed cycle metadata (season, phase, week, cycleID)"
  NARRATIVE-LIFECYCLE-CONTRACT.md: "Cycle Association Log: ledger mapping
    narrative objects to execution cycles"
  ORCHESTRATOR-FINAL-REPORT-CONTRACT.md: cycleMetadata field definitions

ORDERING: Entries must be sorted by canonicalId ascending, then by cycleId
ascending. Required for determinismChecksum stability.

One entry per canonical object per cycle observed.
Duplicate-structural-occurrence events (PSTA returning DUPLICATE status)
produce a new cycle_log entry on the existing canonical ID —
they do NOT produce a new canonical object.

canonicalId.description: Canonical object ID. CPS_*, CME_*, CSN_*, CSE_*, or AU_* prefix.

phase.description: Season phase. e.g., OFFSEASON, REGULAR_SEASON, PLAYOFFS

week.description: Week identifier if applicable. Null for non-weekly phases.

observedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the invocation that produced this entry.
